creator: gerard@seibercom.net
text:
Installing a fresh copy of claws-mail with the 'aspell' option enabled on a fresh installation of FreeBSD-7.2 fails to install the 'enchant' port. That causes claws-mail to not recognize or use the 'aspell' feature.

Fix: 

1) Install the  /usr/ports/textproc/enchant port.

2) Rebuild claws-mail
How-To-Repeat: Do a fresh installation of claws-mail on a system that does not have 'enchant' all ready installed.
